architecture.summary: Local-first skill-creator resolution (.claude/skills/ before global cache). Non-blocking install via claude install-skill. Dedup via prompt injection in signal-collector with 10K token cap.

integrations.summary: Claude Code CLI (claude install-skill subcommand). Anthropic skill-creator GitHub repo. Signal-collector LLM prompt augmentation. Rule file scanning across .claude/skills/, CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, .cursor/rules/, .github/copilot-instructions.md.

ui-ux.summary: No UI changes. CLI-only: silent skip when skill-creator exists, warning log on install failure, warning on duplicate slug detection. Docs rewrite covers user-facing walkthrough.

performance.summary: File-existence check is O(1). Install adds max 5s only on first run. Dedup context capped at 10K tokens to avoid prompt bloat. No runtime perf impact on existing flows.

security.summary: Rule files read-only in dedup context. No .env or credentials included. Truncation prevents accidental secret leakage in large rule sets. Install uses official GitHub URL only.

edge-cases.summary: Claude CLI missing: warn+skip. Permissions denied on .claude/skills/: warn+skip. 50+ rule files: truncate to 10K tokens. Symlinked skill-creator: treat as existing. Empty CLAUDE.md: no-rules path. Concurrent init: idempotent check.
